title: Golden Roast Tunisian Lamb Tagine
description: A malty and juicy post-workout Tunisian dish featuring honey and roast, served in a dolsot-stone-bowl, perfect for a hearty dinner
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, honey, garlic, ginger, cumin, coriander, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Remove the lamb from the marinade and place it in a single layer in a dolsot-stone-bowl.
Roast the lamb in the preheated oven for 2.5 hours, or until it is tender and caramelized.
Baste the lamb with the pan juices every 30 minutes to keep it moist.
Remove the lamb from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes before serving.
Serve the lamb hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
